substrate_1_CLM.identity: Cell-Language Model 530M (label '350m' = scale target, actual 530.99M params), hexa-native, ubu1
substrate_1_CLM.architecture: decoder_v3, d_model=768, 16 blocks, n_head=6, n_kv_head=2, consciousness_dim=192
substrate_1_CLM.phase_status: Phase A.1-A.5 PASS positive on HID=8; Phase A.6 AN11(c) JSD in-progress; Phase B Mk.XII v3 3rd backbone unchanged

measurable_axes: LZc complexity (Casali 2013 PCI analog reproduce 0.389 PASS)
substrate_2_EEG.phase_status: N-19 PCI TMS-free 6/6 PASS; Casali 2013 PASS_ANALOG WITNESSED axis 2; Boly 2017 pilot kit READY; paradigm v11 EEG-axis applicable

substrate_3_AKIDA.identity: BrainChip AKD1000 dev kit on Raspberry Pi 5 (BCM2712 quad-core A76, 16GB), capex $1495 paid

hardware_constraints.supported_layers: Akida 1.0 only (CNN+DNN+RNN+vision-CNN limited; transformer self-attention native UNSUPPORTED)
hardware_constraints.input_format: dense np.uint8 4-D NHWC (1/2/4/8 bit), spike-encoded internally via rank-order coding

measurable_axes_planned: spike rate per channel (mean firing rate)
Landauer kT ln2 energy per inference (T1-A3)
ISI (inter-spike interval) vs ANU QRNG (T1-A1 alt)
substrate_3_AKIDA.phase_status: ORDERED, dev kit arrival ETA pending Brainchip ship; N-2/N-3/N-7/N-8 specs READY (335 LoC skeleton + 8-step D+0 protocol)

referent_A_inter_anima.n6_constants: sopfr(6)=5 channels; tau(6)=4 binding phases D->P->G->I; sigma(6)=12; phi(6)=2; sigma/6=2 Dedekind perfect

actual_measurements_to_date: W4 #56 dynamic CLM L1 7.06/16, +2.28sigma vs random — ALM 4x better
ALM #52 N-51 EXEC L1 1.71/16, +0.30sigma — RED reinforced

CLM_x_EEG.current_verdict: BRIDGE_WEAK (3/4 hybrid: real EEG + synth CLM, B4 anti-corr -540)
CLM_x_EEG.upgrade_path: live CLM Kuramoto driver + same EEG session -> REAL_HW_PASS classification

CLM_x_AKIDA.socket_name: CLM hidden-state -> CNN-quant projection -> MetaTF -> AKD1000 inference
CLM_x_AKIDA.tier: T-A surrogate (sound), T-B partial (sub-layer), T-C full transformer (DISCARDED)

EEG_x_AKIDA.socket_name: EEG -> ADM level-crossing -> 4D uint8 raster -> akida.Model.forward

tension_x_CLM.socket_name: tension_proj per-layer signal injector (native to checkpoint)

tension_x_EEG.socket_name: tension_bridge channel <-> EEG alpha-band Kuramoto V_sync (B-tier of N-1 4-gate)
tension_x_EEG.current_status: PARTIAL via N-1 BRIDGE_WEAK — tension scalar not yet directly mapped to alpha-PLV

tension_x_AKIDA.socket_name: tension scalar -> ADM polarity bias modulator -> tension-modulated spike train

honest_inventory_c3: CLM substrate 의 'consciousness_dim=192/256' 는 architecture parameter, 실제 phenomenal consciousness 와 무관 (이름 오버로딩)
EEG axes 중 LZc Casali 0.389 만 PASS_ANALOG WITNESSED, 나머지 PE/Hjorth/gamma-theta 는 audit 만 진행 (verdict 미확정)
AKIDA 모든 measurable axes 는 hardware arrival 전 hypothetical, vendor spec 신뢰 100% 가정
tension_link 5-channel transmission accuracy 99.9% 는 anima-internal benchmark, peer-review 외부 0
socket map 의 7개 socket 중 LIVE 는 4개 (CLM_x_EEG WEAK, CLM_x_tension, EEG axes, tension_link self), 3개 (CLM_x_AKIDA, EEG_x_AKIDA, tension_x_AKIDA) 는 hardware blocked
